ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "psu_voltage" REAL /* Measured power supply voltage */,
  "shunt_voltage" REAL /* Measured shunt voltage */,
  "load_voltage" REAL /* Measured load voltage */,
  "current" INTEGER /* Measured current */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Label used for identifying the measurement */,
  "ma_psu_voltage" REAL /* Mean adjusted power supply voltage */,
  "ma_shunt_voltage" REAL /* Mean adjusted shunt voltage */,
  "ma_load_voltage" REAL /* Mean adjusted load voltage */,
  "ma_current" REAL /* Mean adjusted current */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement was taken */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device that took the measurement */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the measurement was taken */,
  "calibration_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the device was calibrated at the time of measurement */,
  "measurement_source" TEXT /* Source of the measurement (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., voltage meter, current sensor) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the device is installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the device (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "next_calibration_due" TEXT /* Date of the next calibration due */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, facility manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user within the company */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., voltage drop, current spike) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message about the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., calibration, repair) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* User who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date of the next maintenance due */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the location is */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions granted to this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles_users" (
  "role_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role-user pairing */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., alert_threshold) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of the setting (e.g., system, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the setting */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the setting */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., login, view measurements) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
